name: AgDevCo
description: Impact investor operating exclusively in Sub-Saharan Africa, in the agriculture sector. Provides long‑term capital risk and seasonal working capital, offers matching funding, and supports investees operationally and strategically.

Investing in African agriculture
We are a specialist investor in African agribusinesses. For almost two decades we have supported our portfolio companies with patient capital, sector expertise, and access to our networks.
Our **purpose** is to build great companies that deliver positive impact at scale, while generating returns for our investors.
## Current Portfolio
$340M
Funds under management
40+
Number of active investments
2,641,000 +
Small-scale farmers, traders, and customers linked to market in 2025
38,000+
Jobs created / maintained in 2025
[Our investments](https://www.agdevco.com/our-investments)

## Case Study
## The turnaround of Kasinthula
Five years ago this community-owned sugarcane scheme was on the brink of bankruptcy. With finance and technical support from AgDevCo Kasinthula is once more a thriving business, creating jobs and supporting livelihoods in Malawi's Shire Valley.
[View the case study](https://casestudies.agdevco.com)
![](https://www.agdevco.com/site/assets/files/2293/fund_id_seal_agdevco_december2024_extra_margins_4x.640x0.webp)
AgDevCo is delighted to have been awarded a Platinum rating (the highest available) by **[BlueMark](https://bluemark.co/)** , the leading provider of impact intelligence and independent verification for the sustainable and impact investment market.

tavily.answer:
AgDevCo's official website is https://www.agdevco.com. It is a specialist impact investor in African agribusinesses. Founded in 2009, it focuses on sustainable agriculture development.
AgDevCo is a UK-based impact investor focused on African agribusiness, with over 88 investments and $340 million in assets under management. Founded in 2009, it aims to create jobs and improve food security through sustainable agriculture. It has raised $85 million in its latest funding round.
AgDevCo is a specialist impact investor focused on African agribusiness, founded in 2009 with $340 million in assets under management. It invests in sustainable agriculture to create jobs and improve food security. AgDevCo has made over 88 investments, including in aquaculture and poultry sectors.
AgDevCo is a specialist investor in African agribusiness, established in 2008, with a focus on sustainable and scalable agribusinesses. It received $85 million in funding from BII, Norfund, and Swedfund in 2022. AgDevCo achieved its first profitable year in 2023.
AgDevCo is a major investor in African agribusiness, focusing on small and medium-sized enterprises to boost agricultural productivity and food security. It has invested in over 90 agribusinesses since 2008, aiming for sustainable and inclusive growth. AgDevCo collaborates with international development partners to support smallholder farmers.
